All right, you're back. Great. Now listen, this is between you and yourself. You don't have to tell me what your limiting belief is. Just remember we all have them. You'd be surprised how if you think that you're suffering from terminal uniqueness, I'm sure most people have the same limiting belief as you. This is very common stuff. All right? So here's the deal. Step number two. Now that you know what your belief is, I want you to go back in time and just do your best here and find what references you have. Notice what makes you think this belief is true. Start by going back as far as you can in time. What's the first root experience you can remember that gave this belief its power? Did something happen to you? Did you see something? Did you experience something? Now go back to the resource center right now and I want you to write down at least five experiences starting with the root one. And listen, if you're a little bit confused that you can't go back to the root, don't worry about it. I'll get you there later on. But do your best. Go back to the root experience, then roll forward in time to the most recent one and give me five experiences. Five reasons why you are certain this belief is true. Do that right now. I'll meet you back in the next lesson.
